lore.flying_frisbees.frisbee: Can be thrown and caught in your Mainhand, Offhand, or Head if that space is free while you're facing it. You can also ride it if you're in the air and it hits your feet. Otherwise, a direct hit kind of hurts. Sometimes, all you want to do is go fetch.

lore.flying_frisbees.delta_frisbee: A Frisbee based on a certain fox programmer.
lore.flying_frisbees.loyal_frisbee: A Frisbee that does its very best to return to its owner. Their loyalty renders them incapable of being caught.
death.attack.flying_frisbees.frisbee.ite: %1$s was frisbeed to death from %3$s by %2$s
